---
title: "adfadf"
author: "Arnav Gupta"
date: "2026-04-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Load dataset (already built-in)
data(mtcars)

# Run probit regression
model <- glm(am ~ mpg, 
             data = mtcars, 
             family = binomial(link = "probit"))

# View results
summary(model)
margins(model)
```

```{r}
X <- model.matrix(am ~ mpg, data = mtcars)
y <- mtcars$am

# Initialize
beta <- c(0, 0)

max_iter <- 32

for (i in 1:max_iter) {
  
  # Step 1
  eta <- X %*% beta
  
  # Step 2
  phat <- pnorm(eta)
  qhat <- dnorm(eta)
  
  # Step 3
  ratio <- qhat / (phat * (1 - phat))
  score <- (y - phat) * ratio
  g <- t(X) %*% score
  
  # Step 4
  w <- (qhat^2) / (phat * (1 - phat))
  H <- -t(X) %*% (X * as.vector(w))
  
  # Step 5 update
  beta <- beta - solve(H, g)
  
  # 🔥 PRINT ONLY COEFFICIENTS
  cat("Iteration", i, ":\n")
  cat("Beta0 =", beta[1], " Beta1 =", beta[2], "\n\n")
}
```

```{r}
coef(glm(am ~ mpg, data = mtcars, family = binomial(link="probit")))
```
